docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PR TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY BAKER, KIMBERLY HAIR CLUB

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAKER, KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB $2,132.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,207.00, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF DID NOT RECEIVE THE BENEFIT OF THE CONTRACT ENTERED INTO WITH THE DEFENDANT AND IS THEREFORE ENTITLED TO A REFUND OF WHAT SHE PAID AND CANCELLATION OF THE AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-17-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BAKER, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HAIR CLUB
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
